## Description

<!--
Summarize what this PR changes and why. Link any relevant issues with
"Closes #123" / "Refs #456".
-->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing
      functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor / chore (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) style guide
- [ ] I have run `ruff` / `black` and the code is formatted
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works

## Testing

<!--
Describe how you tested your changes. Run the test suite and paste the
summary below. All existing and new tests must pass.
-->

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] `pytest --cov` shows no regression in coverage
- [ ] Manually verified the store/verify flow (if applicable)

```bash
# Paste your test run summary here, e.g.:
$ pytest -q
...................................... [100%]
42 passed in 3.18s
```
